arts.ttl: Burnley’s upcoming January opponents agree to ‘mutually part ways’ with boss after miserable form
arts.sum: Burnley’s upcoming January opponents Plymouth Argyle have agreed to “mutually part ways” with Wayne Rooney following a miserable run of form.

arts.ttl: ‘A real shock’ – Burnley vs Stoke City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Burnley vs Stoke City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on New Year's Day. The post ‘A real shock’ – Burnley vs Stoke City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Mark Robins to Stoke City decision made as 'perfect fit' for club
arts.sum: Speaking to Football League World, Palmer said: "Some of the names cropping up are David Wagner, Mark Robins, Steve Cooper, and Ryan Lowe. "Mark Robins and the job he's done at Coventry, Steve Cooper has left Leicester City and look at them now inside the bottom three, and David Wagner and Ryan Lowe where we know what they have done at Norwich and Preston.

arts.ttl: Burnley v Stoke City team news: Nine to miss out through injury and two fitness doubts - gallery
arts.sum: Burnley begin 2025 with a New Year’s Day clash against Stoke City back at Turf Moor.

arts.ttl: Major next Stoke City manager shift as new contender in frame
arts.sum: Both Robins and Wagner are said to have been interviewed by Stoke for the job, with sporting director Jon Walters saying the club has already fielded ‘a lot of interest from high calibre’ candidates as they search for a new manager. “We’ve had a lot of interest already from high calibre people but the person who comes in has to understand what it takes to represent Stoke City.

arts.ttl: Stoke City hot-shot's hat-trick quip will make new manager lick his lips
arts.sum: Tezgel’s form on loan at MK Dons in the second half of last season persuaded Stoke to keep him close at hand this term while Lowe went out to play regularly for Walsall. He’s the main man as Walsall bulldoze towards the League Two title and, as League One managers try to tempt him and Stoke that he can spend the second half of the campaign up a level, the bottom line is getting him back for pre-season in a place where he can really compete to be playing regularly for his parent club.

arts.ttl: ‘Absolutely fantastic’: Scott Parker provides glowing review of Burnley’s challenging week after Sheffield United and Middlesbrough games
arts.sum: Scott Parker is delighted with Burnley’s work so far over the festive period after picking up four points from two challenging away games.

arts.ttl: Stoke City manager latest as Ryan Shawcross spells out what new boss will inherit
arts.sum: Shawcross, club legend and under-21s boss, believes there is a group of players as well who are ready to embrace a new identity, with a little bit of help likely to be on its way as the transfer window opens for business. Ryan Shawcross is sure that whoever gets the gig as Stoke City’s next head coach will inherit a young squad with talented players ready to be shaped into a team that can haul the club forward.

arts.ttl: Millwall appoint ex-Preston and Stoke boss Neil
arts.sum: Millwall appoint former Preston, Sunderland and Stoke City boss Alex Neil as their head coach to replace Neil Harris.
